series_metadata.series_title: Individual Taxpayer Waiver for Preparers Electronic Filing Requirement
series_metadata.series_description: Paid tax payers who prepare more than 75 Ohio personal income tax returns for the current tax year must ensure that each return is filed using department-approved electronic media, unless the taxpayer whose return is being filed requests on this form that the return is filed using another department-approved method. To waive the tax preparers requirement to ensure that the return is filed using department-approved electronic media, the taxpayer must complete and sign this form and submit it to the tax preparer.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: and provided audited and report is released ; Electronic: and provided audited and report is released
